hyperedges.label: AI Itinerary Generation Flow
hyperedges.summary: The itinerary generation flow involves the server function calling Claude Haiku, storing results in trips table, and using Unsplash for images.

hyperedges.label: Assistant Access Control
hyperedges.summary: Three-point gating of the AI assistant for free plan users across assistant page, sidebar nav, and dashboard trip card.

hyperedges.label: Subscription & Payment Flow
hyperedges.summary: Payment and subscription management connecting Stripe, payment functions, subscriptions table, and user plan in profiles.

nodes.label: Itineraya
nodes.summary: AI-powered travel planning web app that generates complete itineraries with images, daily activities, and accommodation options.

nodes.label: TanStack Start
nodes.summary: Full-stack React framework used as the core web framework for Itineraya.

nodes.label: TanStack Router
nodes.summary: File-based routing library for TanStack Start handling all route definitions.

nodes.label: React 19
nodes.summary: UI library version 19 used to build the frontend.

nodes.label: TypeScript
nodes.summary: Statically typed JavaScript superset used throughout the codebase.

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS v4
nodes.summary: Utility-first CSS framework v4 used for all styling; no CSS modules.

nodes.label: shadcn/ui
nodes.summary: Component library built on Radix UI used as the primary UI component source.

nodes.label: Radix UI
nodes.summary: Headless UI primitives underlying shadcn/ui components.

nodes.label: Supabase
nodes.summary: Backend-as-a-service providing authentication and PostgreSQL database for Itineraya.

nodes.label: Anthropic API
nodes.summary: Direct Anthropic API integration used for AI itinerary generation and chat assistant.

nodes.label: claude-haiku-4-5
nodes.summary: Anthropic model used for itinerary generation and the chat assistant, with max_tokens 10000.

nodes.label: Unsplash API
nodes.summary: Image API used to supply destination and activity images for itineraries.

nodes.label: Stripe
nodes.summary: Payment processing service used for subscription management.

nodes.label: Resend
nodes.summary: Email delivery service integrated into Itineraya.

nodes.label: i18next
nodes.summary: Internationalization library supporting Spanish and English locales.

nodes.label: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration file specifying the cdg1 region.

nodes.label: Landing Page (index.tsx)
nodes.summary: Public landing page at the root URL /.

nodes.label: Pricing Page (pricing.tsx)
nodes.summary: Public page showing pricing plans and upgrade options.

nodes.label: Dashboard (dashboard.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated main dashboard displaying a list of the user's trips.

nodes.label: New Trip (new-trip.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated multi-step form for creating a new trip.

nodes.label: Onboarding (onboarding.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated initial onboarding flow for new users.

nodes.label: Trip Detail (trip.$tripId.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated page showing the full detail view of a single trip.

nodes.label: Assistant (assistant.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated AI chat page, blocked for users on the free plan.

nodes.label: Inspire (inspire.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated destination inspiration page.

nodes.label: Copilot (copilot.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated travel copilot page.

nodes.label: Profile (profile.tsx)
nodes.summary: Authenticated user profile page.

nodes.label: itinerary.functions.ts
nodes.summary: Server function file handling AI itinerary generation using Claude Haiku.

nodes.label: itinerary-edit.functions.ts
nodes.summary: Server function file handling itinerary editing.

nodes.label: payments.functions.ts
nodes.summary: Server function file containing Stripe payment logic.

nodes.label: stripe.ts / stripe.server.ts
nodes.summary: Stripe client setup files for payment processing.

nodes.label: inspire.functions.ts
nodes.summary: Server function file for destination inspiration logic.

nodes.label: share.functions.ts
nodes.summary: Server function file for trip sharing functionality.

nodes.label: tripmates.functions.ts
nodes.summary: Server function file for travel companions/tripmates feature.

nodes.label: DashboardSidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Navigation sidebar component; blocks the AI assistant nav item for free plan users.

nodes.label: DestinationAutocomplete.tsx
nodes.summary: Destination search input component using Google Maps autocomplete.

nodes.label: Google Maps API
nodes.summary: Google Maps API used for destination autocomplete functionality.

nodes.label: Landing Components (landing/)
nodes.summary: Directory of React components used on the landing page.

nodes.label: Trip Components (trip/)
nodes.summary: Directory of React components used in the trip detail view.

nodes.label: UI Components (ui/)
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui component library directory.

nodes.label: Supabase Integration (integrations/supabase/)
nodes.summary: Supabase client setup and authentication middleware.

nodes.label: auth-middleware.ts
nodes.summary: Middleware protecting all routes under _authenticated/ using Supabase auth.

nodes.label: i18n Locales (es.json, en.json)
nodes.summary: Translation files for Spanish and English languages.

nodes.label: profiles table
nodes.summary: Supabase database table storing user profile data including plan and welcome_completed status.

nodes.label: trips table
nodes.summary: Supabase database table storing trip data including itinerary JSON and hero image.

nodes.label: subscriptions table
nodes.summary: Supabase database table tracking Stripe subscription state per user.

nodes.label: Free Plan
nodes.summary: Basic user plan with no AI assistant access.

nodes.label: Viajero Plan
nodes.summary: Mid-tier paid plan with AI assistant access.

nodes.label: Explorador Plan
nodes.summary: Premium paid plan with full feature access.

nodes.label: UpgradeGate Component
nodes.summary: Component rendered in assistant.tsx for free plan users prompting upgrade.

nodes.label: /api/chat endpoint
nodes.summary: Server-side chat API endpoint using claude-haiku-4-5 for AI responses.

nodes.label: createServerFn()
nodes.summary: TanStack Start utility for defining server functions in *.functions.ts files.

nodes.label: __root.tsx
nodes.summary: Root app shell route that wraps every page via <Outlet />.

nodes.label: routeTree.gen.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated route tree file for TanStack Router; must not be edited manually.

nodes.label: File-based Routing
nodes.summary: TanStack Start routing convention where .tsx files in routes/ map directly to URLs.

nodes.label: _authenticated/ Layout
nodes.summary: Layout route grouping all authenticated pages, protected by auth middleware.

nodes.label: plan.md (.lovable/)
nodes.summary: Implementation plan document detailing migration from Gemini to Anthropic, privacy bug fix, and UI improvements.

nodes.label: Anthropic Migration Plan
nodes.summary: Plan to replace Lovable AI/Gemini gateway with direct Anthropic API calls using @ai-sdk/anthropic.

nodes.label: Privacy Bug Fix (trips RLS)
nodes.summary: Critical fix to add user_id filter to dashboard trips query and correct Supabase RLS policies.

nodes.label: MobileBottomBar
nodes.summary: Mobile navigation bottom bar rendered in _authenticated/route.tsx, hidden on onboarding and generating-trip screens.

nodes.label: HeroSection.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page hero section with 'Empieza gratis' CTA button linking to /auth?mode=signup.

nodes.label: BrandLogo Component
nodes.summary: Reusable brand logo component linked to home URL, used in header and sidebar.

nodes.label: @ai-sdk/anthropic
nodes.summary: Vercel AI SDK Anthropic provider package maintaining streamText/generateText compatibility.

nodes.label: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
nodes.summary: Environment secret for authenticating with the Anthropic API.

nodes.label: favicon.png
nodes.summary: Browser favicon image for the Itineraya web application.

nodes.label: hero-bg.jpg
nodes.summary: Hero section background image used on the landing page.

nodes.label: phone-mockup.jpg
nodes.summary: Phone mockup image likely used in the landing page to showcase the mobile experience.

nodes.label: steps-illustration.jpg
nodes.summary: Illustration image depicting the steps/process flow, used on the landing page.

nodes.label: itineraya-logo.png
nodes.summary: Full Itineraya brand logo image used across the application.

nodes.label: itineraya-mark.png
nodes.summary: Itineraya logomark (symbol only, no wordmark) for compact display contexts.

nodes.label: itineraya-wordmark.png
nodes.summary: Itineraya wordmark (text logo only) for display contexts requiring the text form.

nodes.label: og-image.jpg
nodes.summary: Open Graph image used for social media link previews.

nodes.label: itineraya-mark.svg
nodes.summary: SVG version of the Itineraya logomark for scalable use in code/components.

nodes.label: Supabase RLS Policies
nodes.summary: Row Level Security policies on the trips table controlling data access per user and public visibility.

nodes.label: useRouterState Hook
nodes.summary: TanStack Router hook used to read current pathname for conditional UI rendering.
